remaining_risks.recommendation: Upgrade California to 2GB or 4GB before sustained public production traffic.

future_upgrade_recommendation: Resize California beyond 1GB RAM before heavier factory workloads or sustained external paid traffic.
notes: Real LeadFill paid order webhook verified on California staging with event PAY_0adLohkJYNiExote8KDSWQ.
Payment-derived entitlement active and consume-usage Pro path are both verified on California staging.
California review-watch is deployed in read-only mode, token self-test passed, live fetchStatus returned STAGED, and a 6-hour cron is installed without enabling upload or publish.

A fresh real plugin runtime on California staging verified SEND_OTP, VERIFY_OTP, REGISTER_INSTALLATION, CREATE_CHECKOUT, webhook-driven payment completion, entitlement refresh, popup UI active state, and Pro usage for source=chrome_extension.
The earlier plugin Unauthorized issue was caused by a stale local California public anon key and a stale cached debug profile, not by a live California Auth outage.
California SMTP is now independent on Resend with notify.915500.xyz and no longer depends on the old server relay.
DigitalOcean blocked outbound SMTP ports 465, 587, and 25 to smtp.resend.com, so California Auth uses Resend alternate port 2587.
Resend OTP E2E verified SEND_OTP, delivery, VERIFY_OTP, session creation, get-entitlement, register-installation, free usage, and 11th-attempt QUOTA_EXCEEDED.
DMARC for _dmarc.notify.915500.xyz is still recommended for deliverability but is not a cutover gate blocker.
The user has accepted 1GB RAM plus swap as a temporary California risk and has approved the DNS cutover execution.
The user has now explicitly approved executing DNS cutover for pay.915500.xyz and pay-api.915500.xyz to California.
DNS cutover for pay.915500.xyz and pay-api.915500.xyz to California completed and post-cutover smoke checks passed.
pay.915500.xyz and pay-api.915500.xyz both resolve to 134.199.226.198 with TTL 300 on public resolvers.
Production domain HTTPS passed, webhook GET returned 405, and unsigned webhook POST returned 401 INVALID_SIGNATURE.
Post-cutover Resend OTP, VERIFY_OTP, get-entitlement, register-installation, free usage, 11th-attempt QUOTA_EXCEEDED, and test-mode create-checkout-session all passed.
The production frontend bundle was rebuilt with pay-api.915500.xyz public config and a working public anon key; ca-hwh residue was not detected in the active bundle.
California is now the current primary environment. ca-hwh.915500.xyz and ca-hwh-api.915500.xyz remain as aliases/staging comparison endpoints.
California review-watch credentials doctor passed, token self-test passed, live fetchStatus returned STAGED, and a read-only six-hour cron is installed.
Production payment mode remains disabled and Chrome upload/publish remain disabled.
webhook_diagnostics_note: California has processed a real LeadFill paid order.completed webhook, not only a generic Waffo verification ping.
